mnemonics: MPI: Message Passing Interface (My Program Interacts)
Send & Receive: Like passing notes in class - need a sender and a receiver
Rank & Size: Rank is your seat number, Size is total class size
keyPoints: MPI_Send and MPI_Recv are the fundamental point-to-point communication functions
MPI_Comm_rank identifies a process, MPI_Comm_size gives total number of processes
Collective operations like MPI_Bcast and MPI_Reduce synchronize communication across all processes
commonMistakes: Deadlock from improper ordering of Send/Recv calls
Assuming MPI program execution order is sequential rather than parallel
Mismatched data types between sending and receiving processes
